name: DUOS TECHNOLOGIES GROUP, INC.
summary: Duos Technologies Group, Inc. (DUOT) is a Jacksonville, Florida-based company operating through three subsidiaries: Duos Technologies, Inc. (intelligent inspection/analytics), Duos Edge AI, Inc. (modular Edge Data Centers and infrastructure solutions), and Duos Energy Corporation (energy consulting). The company delivers AI-driven technologies, edge computing infrastructure, manufacturer-agnostic supply chain sourcing, and energy services targeting education, healthcare, enterprise, public sector, and data center markets. It employs approximately 84 people across engineering, software development, operations, and project management.

products.name: Edge Data Centers (EDCs)
products.description: Modular, rapidly deployable data center units bringing enterprise-grade compute capacity closer to end users, supporting AI inference and distributed workloads.

products.name: Duos Technologies Solutions
products.description: Manufacturer-agnostic infrastructure sourcing, logistics coordination, vendor management, and fulfillment services for data center and AI deployments.

products.name: Intelligent Inspection and Analytics Solutions
products.description: Legacy machine vision and AI-based automated inspection and analytics solutions for transportation and logistics applications.

products.name: Energy Consulting Services
products.description: Behind-the-meter electrical power provision and energy-related consulting services offered through Duos Energy Corporation.
